voiceStyle: Grandpa Huxley — British, mid-70s, warm but not soft, patient, curious, dry smirk humor (never laugh-out-loud), measured pace, never urgent
musicMood: soft ambient, contemplative — distant piano, gentle solo cello, warm drone pads, occasional breath of wind chimes
closingTagline: If these stories speak to you... if you find comfort in the lessons found in the quiet corners of history, tap the subscribe button to join our circle of dreamers, and let the next story find you when you need it most.
